case_title: RUFUS L COLE VS. RESERVATION COUNTER, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE AUG-03-2023 ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAIL TO DEFENDANT(RESERVATION COUNTER, LLC)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $713.25 FILED BY COLE, RUFUS L AS TO DEFENDANT RESERVATION COUNTER, LLC BUSKIN RIVER HOSPITALITY, LLC DBA QUALITY INN KODIAK QUALITY INN KODIAK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF RUFUS L COLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RESERVATION COUNTER LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BUSKIN RIVER HOSPITALITY, LLC DBA QUALITY INN KODIAK AND DEFENDANT QUALITY INN KODIAK ARE PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GREG GRAY (EMPLOYEE AND MANAGER) VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM. DEFENDANTS BUSKIN RIVER HOSPITALITY, LLC AND QUALITY INN KODIAK ORALLY STIPULATION TO ALLOW JUDGE PRO TEM TO ADDRESS JURISDICTION ISSUES. COURT ORDERS CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF SMALL CLAIMS COURT JURISDICTION OVER NON-RESIDENT DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-11-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUSKIN RIVER HOSPITALITY, LLC DBA QUALITY INN KODIAK
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
